title: Vantage AI vs Final Round AI — Why prep before, not coach during

scenes.narration: Vantage versus Final Round AI. Different categories of tool. Worth understanding the difference before you pick one.

visual.subtitle: Why prep before · not coach during

scenes.narration: Final Round AI is real-time interview coaching. It transcribes the interviewer in your browser during a live call and surfaces suggested answers as overlays. Pitched as interview copilot.

Here is what most reviewers miss. Many companies treat undisclosed AI assistance during interviews as a serious ethical violation. Multiple major employers have rescinded offers after detecting it. Bloomberg and the Wall Street Journal have covered the trend in 2025 and 2026. The risk is not theoretical.

visual.heading: The hidden risk
bullets: Many companies forbid undisclosed AI assistance
Multiple offers have been rescinded when detected
Bloomberg + WSJ have covered the trend (2025-2026)
Asymmetric risk · small upside, large career downside

scenes.narration: Vantage is the opposite category. Preparation before the interview, not coaching during. Mock interview questions generated from the actual job description. AI-graded practice. CV fit score so you know your gaps before you walk in. You arrive prepared the legitimate way.

visual.heading: Vantage
bullets: Mock interview questions from the actual JD
AI-graded practice · feedback on structure and evidence
CV fit score · know your gaps before the call

scenes.narration: When would I recommend Final Round AI? Honestly, never. The ethical risk is too asymmetric. When would I recommend Vantage? When you want to actually be the right candidate for the role and walk in confident.
Vantage is at aimvantage.uk. Three free analyses on signup, no credit card. Five pounds for twenty tokens if you want more.
